constraints: Approval review packets must remain preview-only and no-effect.
Review packets must bind to the checked-in dry-run packet and foundation closure packet by source path, schema path, packet identity, closure field, and newline-stable SHA-256 digest.
Review packets must not serialize source packet payloads, raw connector payloads, message bodies, secrets, or credentials.
Approval enqueue, connector mutation, external send, memory write, calendar write, task write, deployment mutation, and system-of-record writes remain denied.
non_goals: Do not enqueue an approval from the review packet.
Do not approve, reject, revise, or execute a live action.
Do not call Gmail, Calendar, task, messaging, browser, or memory connectors.
Do not grant live connector, memory, deployment, customer-readiness, or production-readiness authority.
problem_statement: Personal Assistant approval review packets were no-effect previews but only referenced abstract proof URIs, so an operator could not validate that the proposed review was bound to the closed dry-run and foundation closure evidence currently checked into the repository.
success_criteria: Approval review packet schema requires source_closure_refs.
The checked-in approval review packet validates with digest-only refs to the dry-run and foundation closure packets.
Runtime-generated approval review packets validate against the updated schema.
Validator rejects source digest drift, missing required source refs, unclosed source refs, and source payload serialization drift.
No-effect approval, connector, external send, memory, deployment, and system-of-record boundaries remain false.
